title: kolon #2966
definition:
1) a member of a body, particularly the more external and
    prominent members esp. the feet
 2) a dead body, corpse, inasmuch as the members of a corpse are loose
    and fall apart
nasbUsage:

    prominent members esp. the feet
 2) a dead body, corpse, inasmuch as the members of a corpse are loose
